title: Why is AI expensive all of a sudden?
summary: Alberta Tech examines the rising costs of AI systems, tracing the phenomenon through automation cycles and the trend of "tokenmaxxing" where developers artificially increase token usage to boost revenue. The video ultimately identifies deeper structural reasons for AI expense beyond token inflation tricks.
writeup: Alberta Tech investigates why AI systems have become more expensive, framing the shift through automation cycles and "tokenmaxxing," a practice where developers artificially inflate token usage to raise revenue. The video argues the cost increases run deeper than token inflation tricks and points to structural causes behind rising AI expense. Related concepts include token cost tracking and local inference.
